name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .grass-scene{position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#87ceeb 0%,#b8e4f9 55%,#5cb85c 55%,#3d8b3d 100%)}.sky{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#4fa8d8 0%,#87ceeb 40%,#c8ecfa 55%)}.sun{position:absolute;top:8%;left:75%;width:13%;padding-top:13%;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,#fff9a0 30%,#ffe44d 60%,transparent 100%);box-shadow:0 0 10px 4px #ffe44d88;animation:sunpulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.ground{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:45%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#5cb85c 0%,#3d8b3d 60%,#2d6a2d 100%)}.name-wrap{position:absolute;bottom:38%;left:0;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-end;gap:1%;z-index:10}.letter{font-size:clamp(1.2rem,7vw,2.6rem);font-weight:900;font-family:Georgia,serif;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 2px 0 #2a6a0a,0 4px 0 #1a4a06,0 6px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.4);display:inline-block;animation:grow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite}.letter:nth-child(1){animation-delay:0s}.letter:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.15s}.letter:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.3s}.letter:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.45s}.letter:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.6s}.blades{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:50%;pointer-events:none}.blade{position:absolute;bottom:0;width:2.5%;border-radius:50% 50% 0 0/80% 80% 0 0;transform-origin:bottom center;animation:sway 2s ease-in-out infinite}.b1{left:2%;height:28%;background:#4caf50;animation-delay:0s}.b2{left:6%;height:38%;background:#388e3c;animation-delay:.3s}.b3{left:10%;height:22%;background:#66bb6a;animation-delay:.6s}.b4{left:14%;height:35%;background:#43a047;animation-delay:.1s}.b5{left:18%;height:30%;background:#2e7d32;animation-delay:.5s}.b6{left:22%;height:40%;background:#4caf50;animation-delay:.8s}.b7{left:26%;height:26%;background:#388e3c;animation-delay:.2s}.b8{left:31%;height:36%;background:#66bb6a;animation-delay:.7s}.b9{left:36%;height:24%;background:#4caf50;animation-delay:.4s}.b10{left:41%;height:32%;background:#2e7d32;animation-delay:.9s}.b11{left:46%;height:38%;background:#43a047;animation-delay:.15s}.b12{left:51%;height:28%;background:#66bb6a;animation-delay:.55s}.b13{left:56%;height:34%;background:#388e3c;animation-delay:.35s}.b14{left:61%;height:22%;background:#4caf50;animation-delay:.75s}.b15{left:65%;height:40%;background:#2e7d32;animation-delay:.05s}.b16{left:70%;height:30%;background:#43a047;animation-delay:.65s}.b17{left:74%;height:26%;background:#66bb6a;animation-delay:.25s}.b18{left:79%;height:36%;background:#4caf50;animation-delay:.85s}.b19{left:84%;height:32%;background:#388e3c;animation-delay:.45s}.b20{left:89%;height:24%;background:#2e7d32;animation-delay:.95s}@keyframes sway{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-6deg)}50%{transform:rotate(6deg)}}@keyframes grow{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scaleY(1)}50%{transform:translateY(-8%) scaleY(1.06)}}@keyframes sunpulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.9}50%{transform:scale(1.1);opacity:1}}
